ranged.name: Crossbow
ranged.special: 3-turn reload; can stake (-3 to attack, 5+ dmg required)

ranged.name: Short Bow
ranged.special: Can stake (-3 to attack, 5+ dmg required)

ranged.name: Long Bow
ranged.special: Can stake (-3 to attack, 5+ dmg required)

ranged.name: Stun Gun (ranged)
ranged.special: Slow, Stun; bonus successes don't add to damage

ranged.name: Flamethrower, Civilian
ranged.special: Special damage; Incendiary; -2 without Heavy Weapons Spec

ranged.name: Flamethrower, Military
ranged.special: Special damage; Incendiary; -2 without Heavy Weapons Spec

ranged.name: Grenade, White Phosphorus
ranged.special: Blast 5, Force 4; Aerodynamic; AP 3, Incendiary, Concealment

ranged.name: Grenade Launcher, Under-Barrel
ranged.special: Attaches to rifle; uses launched-grenade ammo

ranged.name: Grenade Launcher, Automatic
ranged.special: Tripod/vehicle mount; autofire; uses launched-grenade ammo

melee.name: Stun Gun (melee)
melee.special: Stun; bonus successes don't add to damage modifier

melee.name: Kusari-Gama
melee.special: Chain end: Grapple/Inaccurate/Reach; sickle end: as small knife

melee.name: Whip
melee.special: Grapple, Stun; Dex+Weaponry; bashing unless metal-tipped

armor.name: Bomb Suit
armor.special: Absorbs one explosion before degrading to half value

armor.name: Helmet (Modern)
armor.special: Extends parent armor to head at half rating (round up); -1 Perception

armor.name: Helmet (Archaic)
armor.special: Extends parent armor to head at half rating (round up); -1 Perception

mental.name: Automotive Tools (Basic)
mental.effect: Toolkit for routine auto repairs; trained Specialty can skip rolls for mundane fixes.

mental.name: Cache
mental.effect: Hidden storage that adds to concealment rolls and penalizes searches inside it.

mental.name: Communications Headset
mental.effect: 200 ft range; teamwork bonus on coordinated efforts when practiced.

mental.name: Crime Scene Kit
mental.effect: Bonus to Investigation; lets evidence be moved offsite for unhurried analysis.

mental.name: Code Kit
mental.effect: Bonus to make/break specific cyphers; dice bonus penalizes anyone cracking without the key.

mental.name: Cracking Software
mental.effect: Bonus to breach passwords/firewalls; buffers the hacker from tracebacks.

mental.name: Digital Recorder
mental.effect: Bonus to record/identify words or sounds; contested by Int + Computer to obscure.

mental.name: Duct Tape
mental.effect: Adds 1 Durability or restrains targets (-3 to escape; must beat its Structure).

mental.name: First-Aid Kit
mental.effect: Stabilizes injuries; +1 to Medicine rolls to treat damage (1-dot has no bonus).

mental.name: Flashlight
mental.effect: Offsets darkness penalties; can blind a target on Dex + Athletics vs Stamina.

mental.name: Glowstick
mental.effect: Sustained chemical light; safe underwater. Cannot blind targets.

mental.name: GPS Tracker
mental.effect: Track a target's movements (not in caves/tunnels/sewers).

mental.name: Keylogging Software
mental.effect: Logs keystrokes; install difficulty depends on physical access.

mental.name: Luminol
mental.effect: Reveals traces of blood/bodily fluids; bonus to track or reconstruct scenes.

mental.name: Multi-Tool
mental.effect: Modest bonus on Crafts; enables rolls when no proper tool is available.

mental.name: Personal Computer
mental.effect: Standard household PC; +1 to +4 depending on Availability tier.

mental.name: Smartphone
mental.effect: Calls, web, GPS, camera; +1 to +2 depending on Availability tier.

mental.name: Special Effects
mental.effect: Stage-magic and illusion props; first witness usually falls for the trick.

mental.name: Surveillance Equipment
mental.effect: Cameras/sensors; Int + Computer (or Crafts) contested by intruder's Dex + Stealth.

mental.name: Survival Gear (Basic)
mental.effect: Reduces effective Environment level by 1.

mental.name: Survival Gear (Advanced)
mental.effect: Reduces effective Environment level by 2 (specialized to one environment).

mental.name: Talcum Powder
mental.effect: Reveals unseen presence; 5 successes on Dex + Stealth to cross unobserved.

mental.name: Ultraviolet Ink
mental.effect: Invisible to the naked eye without a UV light; for covert messages.

physical.name: Battering Ram
physical.effect: Teamwork (up to 4); ignores 2 Durability on doors/barricades.

physical.name: Bear Trap
physical.effect: 3 lethal, ignores 2 armor/Durability. Trapped escape = Str + Sta - dice bonus.

physical.name: Caltrops
physical.effect: 1 lethal to anyone crossing; ignores 1 armor/Durability. Half Speed to bypass safely.

physical.name: Camouflage Clothing
physical.effect: Bonus to remain unnoticed in matching terrain.

physical.name: Climbing Gear
physical.effect: Bonus to Str + Athletics climbs; prevents falls greater than 10 feet.

physical.name: Crowbar (tool)
physical.effect: Ignores 2 Durability on locks/barricades when prying. (For combat use, see weapons.)

physical.name: Firearm Suppressor
physical.effect: -1 damage but +2 dice at short range. Conceals shot tells; identifier rolls at -2.

physical.name: Gas Mask
physical.effect: Defends against airborne toxins; +5 dice vs powerful toxin rolls.

physical.name: Handcuffs
physical.effect: Str + Sta - 4 to break (1 bashing per attempt; reduces Structure).

physical.name: Lockpicking Kit
physical.effect: With 1+ Larceny, picks locks without a roll when unhurried; +2 to timed Dex + Larceny.

physical.name: Night Vision Goggles
physical.effect: Removes blind-action penalties in low light; bright lights flashbang the wearer.

physical.name: Pepper Spray
physical.effect: First hit inflicts Stun Tilt and -5 to all actions (reducible by rinsing).

physical.name: Rope
physical.effect: Climbing/binding aid; effective binding Durability = user's Crafts (+1 with Specialty).

physical.name: Stun Gun
physical.effect: Handheld (Weaponry) or ranged (Firearms); 1 lethal + successes subtract from victim's next pool.

physical.name: Bipod
physical.effect: Reduces medium/long range penalty by 1; reduces autofire multi-target penalty by 1.

physical.name: Ear Protection
physical.effect: Prevents deafening from gunfire; -3 to sound-based Perception while worn.

physical.name: Gunsmithing Kit
physical.effect: Dex+Crafts to clean/repair/modify firearms; cleaning needs 5 successes.

physical.name: Light Mount
physical.effect: Offsets darkness penalty; can blind target. Halogen/LED variant +2 (Avail 2).

physical.name: Reloading Bench
physical.effect: Permits home loading of bullets; needed to avoid -5 on Dex+Crafts reloading.

physical.name: Sighting Tools
physical.effect: Wits+Firearms extended (10 successes) to sight in a gun; +1 to medium/long-range attacks for 2x Damage uses.

physical.name: Sight, Fiber Optic
physical.effect: +1 when aiming; works day or night.

physical.name: Sight, Laser
physical.effect: +1 at short/medium range; visible red dot may warn targets.

physical.name: Sight, Laser (Infrared)
physical.effect: As laser sight; beam only visible through night vision.

physical.name: Scope, Telescopic
physical.effect: Ignore medium-range penalty; halve long-range penalty.

physical.name: Scope, Night Vision
physical.effect: Ignore darkness penalty at short/medium; -1 reduction at long range. Day/night variant Avail 4.

physical.name: Scope, Thermal
physical.effect: No medium/short penalty vs warm targets; long-range capped at -1. No effect on cold/undead.

physical.name: Speedloader
physical.effect: Quick reload of revolver or action-fed rifle/shotgun without sacrificing Defense.

physical.name: Collapsible Stock
physical.effect: Reduces weapon Size by 1 (min 2). Retrofit: Dex+Crafts, 5 successes.

physical.name: Suppressor
physical.effect: -4 Perception to hear shot (subsonic); -2 (supersonic); -3 to locate shooter.

physical.name: Binoculars
physical.effect: Clear vision to extreme range; -1 long, -3 extreme on sight Perception. Night vision variant Avail 3.

physical.name: Bug (Listening Device)
physical.effect: Transmits audio to ~1/4 mile. Wits+Larceny to plant. Smaller bugs Avail 3 (-1 to find).

physical.name: Bug Sweeper
physical.effect: +2 to Wits+Investigation rolls to find audio/video recorders.

physical.name: Disguised Camera
physical.effect: Hidden cam in everyday object; ~2 hr internal recording. Smaller cams Avail 3.

physical.name: Tracking Device
physical.effect: Trace target location via GPS or phone. Wits+Larceny +2 to conceal (size).

physical.name: Keystroke Logger
physical.effect: Captures all keystrokes including BIOS passwords. Wits+Computer to install covertly.

physical.name: Reverse Peephole
physical.effect: View through a door's existing peephole; Wits+Investigation at -4.

physical.name: Spyware
physical.effect: Logs keystrokes, browsing, chat. Install via hacking attempt or physical media.

physical.name: Wi-Fi Sniffer
physical.effect: Scans for wireless networks within medium range; more discrete than a laptop.

physical.name: Wiretap
physical.effect: Int+Larceny to install on phone/line; contested by Wits+Investigation.

physical.name: NBC Suit
physical.effect: +5 vs nuclear/biological/chemical agents and radiation. Punctured suit loses all protection.

physical.name: Potassium Iodide
physical.effect: +1 to resist up to level-3 radiation; must be taken 4 hours before exposure.

physical.name: Survival Kit (Basic)
physical.effect: Wilderness day-pack. +1 to Survival and Sta+Res vs exposure.

physical.name: Survival Kit (Advanced)
physical.effect: Compass, tent, multi-tool, etc. +2 Survival/exposure; negates level-2 environment.

physical.name: Survival Kit (Superior)
physical.effect: GPS, water filter, week of food/water. +3 Survival/exposure; negates level-3 environment.

physical.name: Survival Kit (Urban)
physical.effect: 'Go Bag' for urban disasters. +3 Survival/exposure; +1 only when used in wilderness.

social.name: Cash
social.effect: Bribe bonus equal to its Availability rating; or buys items of equal Availability.

social.name: Disguise
social.effect: Bonus to blend in; emulates the first dot of one situational Social Merit.

social.name: Fashion
social.effect: Bonus = ceil(Availability / 2) when properly dressed for the venue; penalty if not.
